title: Lead SEO Specialist at Adidas India Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Lead SEO Specialist at Adidas India Ventures Solutions
jsonLd.description:
Adidas India Ventures Solutions invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of SEO Specialist at our Howrah location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Adidas India Ventures Solutions:
Adidas India Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Develop and implement category growth strategies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Product Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Adidas India Ventures Solutions!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
